patch.value: chore: 2026-07-06 ecosystem audit #13 — Semgrep-issue metadata backfill, scale-out initiative pm-9rxu, composability contract set

Third same-day audit (follows #11 morning, #12 evening; session item pm-3rgp). Full all-status review at 1621 items: commits dc0dc252/00d01c69/9c909a58 map 1:1 to items (audit-12 batch, pm-6e1d, pm-rjqr); no GH issue newer than 474; zero open orphans. Gaps found and fixed this session: (1) 40 Semgrep finding Issues + batch pm-oz8u were active without AC/estimate — backfilled per-finding AC referencing the Semgrep ID and location; (2) pm-doxj capability index was missing pm-qwoy; (3) no tracker home existed for the stated scale goal (100k-1M items, thousands of agents) — created initiative epic pm-9rxu + ADR pm-bl8x + 7 children (pm-mi2x/pm-801d/pm-dfg0/pm-0qg5/pm-lvyd/pm-o79o/pm-g2zz); (4) no tracker home for the grep/jq composability principle — created pm-m9xv story + pm-646c NDJSON + pm-psy1 scripting contract under pm-mpbb; (5) recorded long-term horizon ordering (near/mid/long) on pm-doxj. Verified healthy without changes: pm-n7rr and pm-usfg initiative trees (the requested simplification + SDK-first brainstorms already fully materialized, 64/64 commands and 8/8 SDK domains covered).

All active items carry AC+estimate (validate metadata warnings for active items zero); every strategic goal stated for the product (simplification, SDK-first, scale to 1M items / 1000s of agents, unix composability, long-term horizons) has a dedup-checked tracker home; roadmap milestone index current incl. pm-qwoy; changelog regenerated drift-free

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Audit #13 gotchas: (1) pm list --status ... --format json | jq length returned 6 for ~150 rows — never count actives from list --json; use the table output or per-id gets. (2) validate --json (not --format json) exposes .checks[].details.missing_acceptance_criteria_item_ids / missing_estimated_minutes_item_ids — exact backfill worklists, truncation-flagged. (3) Per-finding scanner Issues created by batch import land without AC/estimate — future scanner-import batches should seed AC/estimate at creation time (pattern: remediate-or-suppress + rescan-clean + gates-green).

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Strategic layer completed this session: initiatives now number three (pm-n7rr simplification, pm-usfg SDK-first, pm-9rxu scale-out) plus the composability contract set (pm-m9xv/pm-646c/pm-psy1). Horizon ordering recorded on pm-doxj: near = simplification+SDK-first, mid = composability + code-scanning zero-findings, long = scale-out (implementation deliberately behind the SDK-first primitive layer). Dedupe evidence: scalability/sharding/pagination/ndjson/xargs/exit-code searches all returned only unrelated closed items before creation.

patch.value: Full-ecosystem audit finds and fixes every tracker gap: metadata coverage, index currency, and tracker homes for all stated strategic goals

41 metadata backfills applied; pm-qwoy indexed; scale-out initiative (pm-9rxu + ADR pm-bl8x + 7 children) and composability set (pm-m9xv/pm-646c/pm-psy1) created dedup-checked; long-term horizons recorded on pm-doxj; validate metadata warnings for active items now zero

Audit #13 complete: 41 Semgrep-item metadata backfills; roadmap index fixed (pm-qwoy); third initiative pm-9rxu (scale to 1M items / 1000s agents, ADR pm-bl8x, 7 children); composability set pm-m9xv/pm-646c/pm-psy1; horizon plan on pm-doxj; validate/health green, zero open orphans
